subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon when the Lord of Names appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن توجه الی الافق الاعلی اذ ظهر مالک الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
